overall.summary: Overall score uses minimum dimension score 8 capped by highest severity LOW.

proposal_semantics.proposal_summary: Activate support for the eth_sendRawTransactionConditional RPC endpoint on the Arbitrum One and Nova mainnets to support ERC-4337 account abstraction and bundlers.

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum DAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This AIP proposes that the Arbitrum DAO activate support for this endpoint

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum One
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: on the One and Nova mainnets.

disclosed_entities.name: Arbitrum Nova
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: on the One and Nova mainnets.

claimed_actions.raw_action: Change the load balancer config value to remove the 0 slots restriction
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Allows conditional transactions to use up to 1,000 slots and activates the eth_sendRawTransactionConditional endpoint.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: steps to implement this AIP reduce to changing the load balancer config value as described above.

claimed_complexity.reason: Implementation only requires changing a configuration value on the load balancer, as the feature is already developed and tested in Nitro v2.0.14.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: The work already done by Offchain Labs on this endpoint means that the steps to implement this AIP reduce to changing the load balancer config value as described above.

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: Ethereum researchers have proposed a new RPC endpoint eth_sendRawTransactionConditional that adapts L2 sequencers
This endpoint adds new options to the standard eth_sendRawTransaction endpoint

limitations: No specific target contract addresses or precise configuration parameters are detailed in the proposal text.
